testcase.name: contextLoads

16196 --- [api] [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists foco_estrategico cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists foco_estrategico_areas_potenciais cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists ideia cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists marco_projeto cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists usuario cascade Hibernate: create table foco_estrategico (ativo boolean not null, descricao varchar(255), id varchar(255) not null, mes varchar(255), titulo varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table foco_estrategico_areas_potenciais (areas_potenciais varchar(255), foco_estrategico_id varchar(255) not null) Hibernate: create table ideia (basekm integer, investimento float(24), is_strategic_bonus boolean not null, retorno float(24), roi_esperado float(24), area varchar(255), autor varchar(255), data varchar(255), descricao varchar(255), esforco varchar(255), id varchar(255) not null, impacto varchar(255), observacao_progresso varchar(255), prazo varchar(255), prioridade varchar(255), responsavel varchar(255), status varchar(255), titulo varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table marco_projeto (id integer generated by default as identity, is_completo boolean not null, data_completo varchar(255), ideia_id varchar(255), titulo varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table usuario (id bigint generated by default as identity, matricula varchar(255), nome varchar(255), senha varchar(255), perfil enum ('GESTOR','LIDERANCA','OPERADOR'), primary key (id)) Hibernate: alter table if exists foco_estrategico_areas_potenciais add constraint FKkm1x0ck10ys33riwb0nsi8axv foreign key (foco_estrategico_id) references foco_estrategico Hibernate: alter table if exists marco_projeto add constraint FKcvfnbou1nw00g7nik857l9jkw foreign key (ideia_id) references ideia testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\Pedro\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.17.7\byte-buddy-agent-1.17.7.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release
